title: Parse plan docs and organize tasks into beads issues
description:
Read and parse all three planning documents created during the MAST reimagining session:

- docs/01-strategic-vision.md — Strategic vision, payment model, brand architecture
- docs/02-platform-plan.md — Platform/hosting plan, Laravel migration, mobile strategy  
- docs/03-design-spec.md — Design/UX spec, wireframes, component library

Extract all actionable tasks, implementation items, and milestones from these docs and create individual beads issues for each, organized with proper dependencies and labels (e.g. backend, frontend, design, infra, payments, mobile).

Key areas to extract tasks from:
1. Payment model refactor (charge-on-commit, refund-on-complete, Stripe Connect)
2. Laravel migration from Craft CMS
3. Capacitor/Ionic Vue mobile app setup
4. API design (Laravel Sanctum, REST endpoints)
5. Crypto escrow smart contracts (Solana/Base)
6. Three-variant UI (MAST Vorpal, Sidekick, AI)
7. Design system and component library
8. Feature flag architecture
9. Infrastructure and hosting (DigitalOcean + Forge)
